arts.ttl: Cambiaso’s Agent Confirms Manchester City Interest, Praises Napoli’s Strategy
arts.sum: Andrea Cambiaso's agent Giovanni Bia has shed light on the recent transfer speculation surrounding his client and Manchester City. Speaking to Kiss Kiss Napoli, Bia confirmed the veracity of reports linking Cambiaso with a move to the Premier League champions. The post Cambiaso’s Agent Confirms Manchester City Interest, Praises Napoli’s Strategy appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Manchester City have £369m weapon that will send shivers down spine of rivals
arts.sum: Manchester City are in a position of extraordinary financial strength when it comes to being active in the transfer market

arts.ttl: Secret release clause could pave way for SHOCK Haaland summer transfer
arts.sum: According to Catalan outlet El Nacional, Haaland has a release clause in his new deal that comes into place if City fail to qualify for the Champions League. The failure to qualify for Europe’s premier competition would be a massive shock to the 2023 winners but it could lead to an unprecedented situation where Haaland would be allowed to leave City for a cut-price fee.

arts.ttl: Man City XI vs Leyton Orient: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for FA Cup
arts.sum: Nico Gonzalez could be involved after completing his deadline day transfer

arts.ttl: Jamie Donley vows to rattle Manchester City as Leyton Orient dream of cup shock
arts.sum: The Tottenham loanee is eager to add to his five goals and six assists this season.
